name: China Yuanbang Property Holdings Limited
summary: China Yuanbang Property Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, develops, manages, markets, and sells residential and commercial properties in the People's Republic of China. It is also involved in the tourism and resorts development operations; hotel business; agricultural tourism operations; and property investment activities. The company targets the middle to upper-middle income market segments. China Yuanbang Property Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2006 and is based in Guangzhou, China.
